highestScorer.understandingSummary: Yadav has covered the basics of TestNG annotations and their execution order. However, he missed understanding testng.xml configuration and practical uses.
missingConcepts: Testng.xml structure and parameterization for different driver setups.
mentorRecommendations: Create a testng.xml file with multiple runs to demonstrate configuration and how parameters map to actual drivers.

lowestScorer.understandingSummary: Understands framework/tool distinction but lacks detail on TestNG execution and practical examples.
strengths: Can explain difference between Selenium/Appium and TestNG
missingConcepts: Details on TestNG execution flow and specific annotations like @Test, @BeforeMethod, etc.
mentorRecommendations: Explore in-depth with specific examples to reinforce understanding of TestNG structure and flow.
lowestScorer.nextLearningGoal: Learn details about TestNG execution flow, hooks, and specific features.
lowestScorer.feedback: Sharma has a basic grasp on the difference between frameworks (TestNG) and tools (Selenium/Appium), but needs more concrete examples to solidify their understanding of how TestNG functions in practice.

topPerformers.understandingSummary: Yadav has covered the basics of TestNG annotations and their execution order. However, he missed understanding testng.xml configuration and practical uses.
missingConcepts: Testng.xml structure and parameterization for different driver setups.
mentorRecommendations: Create a testng.xml file with multiple runs to demonstrate configuration and how parameters map to actual drivers.

topPerformers.understandingSummary: The student understands the concept of setting up tasks at class level rather than per method, but lacks comprehensive grasp of all TestNG features and execution flow.
strengths: Grasped the idea to move setup logic to hooks for better organization.
missingConcepts: Lacks understanding of full TestNG execution flow, testng.xml parameterization, and advanced annotation usage.
mentorRecommendations: Deep dive into TestNG execution flow and parameterization in xml files.
topPerformers.nextLearningGoal: Understand the complete setup and teardown process within TestNG including parameterization.
topPerformers.feedback: The student has a good grasp of one aspect but needs further clarification on other aspects to achieve full comprehension.
